description: Karaite betrothal deed. Location: Cairo. Dated 19 Elul 5428 AM (1668 CE). Bride: Qamr bt. Ṣemaḥ b. Efrayīm. Groom: Shelomo b. Yahūda b. Shelomo Rofe. Contains the common stipulations found in this period: The groom is taking upon himself not to marry another wife for 20 years unless his wife is childless for 10 years. Also not to travel outside of Egypt-except for Jerusalem. The marital payments from the groom are listed as: 50 kesif + 210 medin + 200 medin + 800 medin.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
